name: live_iss
_note: astronomy.live_iss (server/domains/astronomy-live.js) fetches the current ISS location from a live API (wheretheiss.at). EXTERNAL-IO — auto-skipped by the harness (name matches /^live_/) and driven against this static contract only. Fail-soft: on network failure it returns { ok:false, reason:... } and never throws. The /lenses/astronomy NasaLivePanel calls it via lensRun({ domain:'astronomy', name:'live_iss' }) (and polls it on a 5s interval while the ISS tab is open). Marked external_io:true so it is never driven against the live endpoint.
